evidence.scientific_clarity: Stacked bar with 5 conditions and 4 classes summing to 100% directly fulfills the brief; y-axis uses PercentFormatter with clear 0–100% range.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 confirmed (CIDFontType2/TrueType embedded in PDF); svg.fonttype=none confirmed (15 <text> elements, not paths); Arial used throughout, no DejaVu Sans.
evidence.palette: All four colors (#E69F00, #56B4E9, #009E73, #CC79A7) are from the Okabe–Ito colorblind-safe palette; used categorically, no directional green/red misuse.
evidence.layout_density: Single-column width (3.46 in) with bar_width=0.6 is reasonable, but legend at x=226 overlaps the rightmost bar's right edge (x≈241) and sits only ~5 pt below bar tops.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Legend is frameless and placed upper-right but geometrically overlaps the Cond5 bar area; caption describes chart structure but contains no numerical finding a reviewer could verify.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF contains /Subtype /CIDFontType2 with /FontFile2 (TrueType stream) confirming Type-42 embedding; text is selectable/editable.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (17 kB), figure.png (33 kB), figure.svg (11 kB), caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial; brief required pdf+png+caption+script, all satisfied.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption correctly names the chart type, five conditions, four classes, and Okabe–Ito palette, but provides zero numerical claims or specific findings (e.g., which class dominates which condition).

overall_strengths: Exemplary technical hygiene: pdf.fonttype=42, svg.fonttype=none, Arial font, Okabe–Ito palette, and clean spine removal all implemented correctly.
All required output files are present and non-trivial; y-axis range and tick spacing are well-chosen for proportion data.
overall_weaknesses: Legend placed at upper-right overlaps the rightmost bar column horizontally and sits only ~5 pt below the 100% bar tops — a layout collision a reviewer would flag.
Caption is purely structural (describes chart type and palette) with no quantitative takeaway; a reviewer would request at least one numerical finding or trend statement.
